query: Install Forge into this repo and configure it for Claude and Cursor.
Initialize forge in this fresh repository with the minimal adoption profile.
Run forge doctor — is the kernel database on a cloud-synced path?
Upgrade forge and self-heal anything unsafe first.
Install the Forge native hooks globally for Codex.
Undo the forge install — reset this repo's forge files.
Disable the TDD gate, it's blocking my commit.
Set up the database schema for the new billing feature.
Upgrade the eslint dependency to the latest version.
Install the project dependencies with bun install.
